name: Red Clay Face Mask 100g
description: Red Kaolin is more suitable for normal to dry skin. It can make a great addition to acne masks or detoxifying body wraps.This clay is rich in iron oxide and copper and low in aluminium and it was traditionally used in treating joint pain and washing to protect oneself from infections and disease.Red Kaolin clay has anti-inflammatory property. It’s also reduces swelling on affected areas and also stimulates blood circulation.How to make clay mask- Mix a small amount of the clay with water or our Floral Water until it forms into a smooth paste.- Apply the clay mask on the face or body and allow it to stand for about 10 to 15 minutes, or until the paste dries.- Rinse with lukewarm water and pat the face dry with a soft towel.- You can even add essential oils to the clay mask for better results.

name: Green Clay Face Mask 100g
description: Green  clay mask is the most sought after for skin conditions and cosmetic purposes. It draws impurities from the pores. This makes it perfect for detoxifying and removing impurities from the skin.Illite clay can be used for both normal and oily skin because of its ability to restore skin to its natural pH balance. It also stimulates blood circulation to the skin to helps with many types of skin conditions, including acne, psoriasis, eczema, rosacea, bug bites and sunburn.How to make clay mask- Mix a small amount of the clay with water or our Floral Water until it forms into a smooth paste.- Apply the clay mask on the face or body and allow it to stand for about 10 to 15 minutes, or until the paste dries.- Rinse with lukewarm water and pat the face dry with a soft towel.- You can even add essential oils to the clay mask for better results.

name: Pink Clay Face Mask 75g
description: Pink kaolin clay is a blend of white kaolin clay and red kaolin clay. It contains: Silicium, aluminium, iron, magnesium, sodium, phosphorus, calcium and other trace elements.This clay is ideal for normal and sensitive skin types due to its unique balance of properties. It helps in stimulating circulation on the skin, exfoliating and cleansing.It does not draw oil from the skin so it’s suitable to use it on dry skin. Also for dehydrated skin.How to make clay mask- Mix a small amount of the clay with water or our Floral Water until it forms into a smooth paste.- Apply the clay mask on the face or body and allow it to stand for about 10 to 15 minutes, or until the paste dries.- Rinse with lukewarm water and pat the face dry with a soft towel.- You can even add essential oils to the clay mask for better results

name: Fuller Earth Face Mask 100g
description: This type of clay contains various minerals, including magnesium, quartz, silica, iron, calcium, calcite and dolomite.It has exceptional oil-absorbing, cleansing and antiseptic properties and can be used as an exfoliant as it draws out impurities from the skin.How to make clay mask- Mix a small amount of the clay with water or our Floral Water until it forms into a smooth paste.- Apply the clay mask on the face or body and allow it to stand for about 10 to 15 minutes, or until the paste dries.- Rinse with lukewarm water and pat the face dry with a soft towel.- You can even add essential oils to the clay mask for better results.

name: Cutter For Soap Loaves
description: AWGifts Dropship Europe Soap Cutter. If you are selling Soap Loaves or any other unwrapped soaps you will want to do a professional job of cutting and wrapping them at the sales point.To this end we supply the following, although you may also want to consider our Organza Bags or Polyprop Bags.You can cut the soap loaves with a knife but if you use a soap cutter you can achieve more uniform soaps and it’s quicker. Our soap cutter cuts approximately 2 cm soap slices.Please note this soap cutter is not suitable for our Aromatherapy Soap Loaves (ASoap) and Loofah Soap Loaves (Lsoap)

name: Konjac Sponge - Charcoal
description: Japanese Konjac Sponge. This 100% natural sponge has a soft texture, a natural facial and body cleansing sponge made out of vegetable fibers of Konjac root.The Konjac Sponge has been used in Japan first as a bath sponge for newborn babies for more than 100 years because of its soft texture. Due to the popularity the Konjac Sponge has been on the rise as facial cleansing and bath sponge in China, Southeast Asia and Europe.100% Natural & Biodegradable, Handmade Konjac Fibre and Ancient Japanese Beauty Secret.

name: Floral Fizz - Lay Back  & Languish
description: The Lay Back & Languish Floral Fizz contains lavender, wich is far more than just an aromatic plant. It is well known for its healing properties, some of its benefits are the ability of treating anxiety, fungal infections or hair loss. Also works as a sedative, helps to increase relaxation and calm, and fights insomnia. That is all you need for a perfect, gentle, relaxing bath.Made with the best, carefully chosed ingredients, every Floral Fizz has its own unique scent and color, all are scrumptiously scented and lavishly decorated.  Our approx 200g bath fizzes are truly brilliant. Everyone needs sometimes some pampering. Fizz up your bath with these marvellous Floral Fizzes.

name: Floral Fizz - Passion Fashion
description: The Passion Fashion Floral Fizz is made with Cabbage Rose, also known as “hundred petal” rose, which has a very specific, clear, sweet, honey-like scent. In combination with the heavy, slightly fruity floral scent of Ylang-Ylang you can be sure, that tis fizz will wake up your passion.Made with the best, carefully chosed ingredients, every Floral Fizz has its own unique scent and color, all are scrumptiously scented and lavishly decorated.  Our approx 200g bath fizzes are truly brilliant. Everyone needs sometimes some pampering. Fizz up your bath with these marvellous Floral Fizzes.

name: Floral Fizz - AliveAlive!
description: The combination of corn mint, rosemary and spearmint in AliveAlive! Floral Fizz will definitely wake up your senses, thanks to their aromatic, fresh scent. Above it, these herbs are great antioxidants, they enhance memory and concentration and reduce stress. So after a bath with this fizz, you will feel stronger and really alive!Made with the best, carefully chosed ingredients, every Floral Fizz has its own unique scent and color, all are scrumptiously scented and lavishly decorated.  Our approx 200g bath fizzes are truly brilliant. Everyone needs sometimes some pampering. Fizz up your bath with these marvellous Floral Fizzes.

description: The Force of Nature Floral Fizz contains Chamomile, which is used for helping with sleep and relaxation, treating cold symptoms, treatment for mild skin conditions. Take a warm bath with this fizz and you will feel completly relaxed.Made with the best, carefully chosed ingredients, every Floral Fizz has its own unique scent and color, all are scrumptiously scented and lavishly decorated.  Our approx 200g bath fizzes are truly brilliant. Everyone needs sometimes some pampering. Fizz up your bath with these marvellous Floral Fizzes.

name: Floral Fizz - Romantic Rebel
description: The combination of English Lavender oil, Patchouli oil and Provence Rose petals contained in Romantic Rebel Floral Fizz makes it really very special.Lavender helps lighten the skin and reduce wrinkles, patchouli treats skin conditions such as dry skin, provides feelings of relaxation and helps to ease stress. Rose petals can help soothe irritated skin and reduce its redness, not to mention, that they are so romantic! Made with the best, carefully chosed ingredients, every Floral Fizz has its own unique scent and color, all are scrumptiously scented and lavishly decorated.  Our approx 200g bath fizzes are truly brilliant. Everyone needs sometimes some pampering. Fizz up your bath with these marvellous Floral Fizzes.

name: Floral Fizz - Dream in Blue
description: Roman chamomile has calming and anti-bacterial properties. It fights against inflammation of the skin. Since it has antiseptic qualities, it is able to remove bacteria. Both of these are contained in Dream in Blue Floral Fizz and it is a guarantee of a dreamy bath.Made with the best, carefully chosed ingredients, every Floral Fizz has its own unique scent and color, all are scrumptiously scented and lavishly decorated.  Our approx 200g bath fizzes are truly brilliant. Everyone needs sometimes some pampering. name: Snug Jute Mitt - Brown
description: These luxurious Brown Snug Jute Mitts are an absolute essential to any bathroom. They have properties blended to create a real feeling of freshness and are very ideal for exfoliating, removing dead skin cells and leaving your skin soft and renewed. Perfect for spa and massage centres these mitts are completely biodegradable and therefore environmentally friendly.Exfoliation should be in everyone's beauty regime all year round but especially in cold weather to keep skin looking radiant and fresh.

name: Paper Soaps - Cherry
description: Compact, convenient and easy to use paper soaps! Just add water to these pleasantly fragranced, wafer-thin soap sheets and watch them instantly transform into a sudsy lather.Each sheet deliver the perfect amount of product required to do the job and are also biodegrable and safe for the environment.Comes in a virtually weightless and compact flip-top case of 20 single-use sheets that are portable enough to pop in your desk, purse, car, gym bag, or pocket for handy everyday use.

name: Classic Scrunchies 5 asst (display tube) - 40gm
description: These sponges are an ideal bath and shower accessory that will also look great in the bathroom!  Scrunchies are an essential for bath lovers, the dense layers of mesh create a rich lather and ideal texture to gently polish the skin. Great for use with liquid soaps and body wash. Scrunchies have a convenient strap for drying and for easy storage. Large at 50g and super soft, they are the perfect accessory for a luxurious cleansing experience.These bright bath scrunchies clean, exfoliate and massage all at the same time to help keep the skin feeling silky smooth. You can sell sponges as part of deals to sell soap loaves or bath-bombs.   Directions for use: Use with your favourite body wash in a circular motion to cleanse and exfoliate, leaving your skin smooth and soft. Rinse thoroughly after use and hang to dry naturally.

name: Tropical Paradise Coco Bath Bombs - Watermelon
description: An amazing scent of AWGifts Dropship Europe Tropical Paradise Coco Bath Bombs -  Watermelon with its sweet, fresh and fruity tropical fragrance.Each bomb weighs in at a massive 180 grams and contains a generous portion of Coconut Butter to make it smoother on your skin, with colourful soap peelings which helps to create silky foam and cleanse the body while you are having a tropical bath experience. For each three bath bombs of the same size purchased from any range the order will come in a free natural style cardboard giftbox.  Full colour ingredients list included.

name: Tropical Paradise Coco Bath Bombs - Papaya
description: An amazing scent of AWGifts Dropship Europe Tropical Paradise Coco Bath Bombs -  Papaya with its sweet, fresh and fruity tropical fragrance.Papaya (also known as pawpaw) has a sweet, mouthwatering fragrance that smells truly tropical. Each bomb weighs in at a massive 180 grams and contains a generous portion of Coconut Butter to make it smoother on your skin, with colourful soap peelings which helps to create silky foam and cleanse the body while you are having a tropical bath experience.For each three bath bombs of the same size purchased from any range the order will come in a free natural style cardboard giftbox.  Full colour ingredients list included.

name: Tropical Paradise Coco Bath Bombs - Kiwi Fruit
description: An amazing scent of AWGifts Dropship Europe Tropical Paradise Coco Bath Bombs -  Kiwi Fruit with its sweet, fresh and fruity tropical fragrance.Kiwifruit, traditionally called Chinese Gooseberry, has an intensely floral, almost winey scent that is delightfully tangy. Each bomb weighs in at a massive 180 grams and contains a generous portion of Coconut Butter to make it smoother on your skin, with colourful soap peelings which helps to create silky foam and cleanse the body while you are having a tropical bath experience.For each three bath bombs of the same size purchased from any range the order will come in a free natural style cardboard giftbox.  Full colour ingredients list included.

name: Tropical Paradise Coco Bath Bombs - Strawberry
description: An amazing scent of AWGifts Dropship Europe Tropical Paradise Coco Bath Bombs -  Strawberry with its sweet, fresh and fruity tropical fragrance.Okay, so we know strawberries aren't really a tropical fruit but they're so sweet and deliciously fruity, with its distinctive fragrance of fruity-green with a flowery touch, that they earn an honorary tropical title. Each bomb weighs in at a massive 180 grams and contains a generous portion of Coconut Butter to make it smoother on your skin, with colourful soap peelings which helps to create silky foam and cleanse the body while you are having a tropical bath experience.For each three bath bombs of the same size purchased from any range the order will come in a free natural style cardboard giftbox.  Full colour ingredients list included.

description: Volcanic Lava Foot Stone will never lose its effectiveness or shape. Naturally made Volcanic Foot Stone safely assists in the exfoliation of dry, dead skin from the body, hands and especially the feet.  This simple yet amazing little stone that fits nicely in your hand is lightweight, with a surface made of tiny little holes. White Himalayan Bath Salts Fine Grain - 25kg Sack
description: Himalayan crystal salt is pristine and natural. It consists of the perfect geometric structure possible in rock crystals, the result of millions of years of compression under the Earth's surface. It forms a precise mesh with our body's inner workings because Himalayan crystal salt contains an almost identical set of elements to those found inside the human body: that is, it contains 84 of the possible 92 trace minerals, and in the same proportions as naturally exists in our blood.

name: Himalayan Heart Deodorant Stone
description: Himalayan Salt Deodorant is a pure, hand-mined salt that is derived from ancient sea salt deposits in the foothills of the Himalayas. These Natural deodorants are not processed in any way except they are carved from natural chunks of Himalayas Crystals. The deodorant stone leaves a layer of protection that helps prevent odour causing bacteria from forming.Himalayan Salt has a rich mineral content that includes over 84 minerals and trace elements such as calcium, magnesium, potassium, copper and iron.You can use Himalayan salt deodorant for a chemical-free alternative to commercial deodorants. You can wet it and use it as a regular deodorant bar to provide an invisible layer of salt to deter odours. Sea salt is known for its stimulating and soothing properties. Himalayan Salt Deodorant Stones can be used in a variety of ways, can be frozen to give a cooling sensation or heated and applied to any area of the body for a nice warming sensation or even used as a massage stone to get deep relaxation and improving sleep quality, helping the relaxation to the body as the stones gently draw toxins from the skin while soothing tense, sore muscles.The Salt Deodorant Stone is not meant to be used internally.Natural Mineral Salt deodorant protection.It feels clean and fresh.Hypoallergenic and Fragrance-Free. Eliminates body odour.  Unisex.

name: Aromatherapy Bath Potion in Kraft Bag 350g - Total Unwind
description: AWGifts Aromatherapy Bath Potions - Total Unwind are made with an artful blend of Pure Essential Oils in sea salt in our production site in Sheffield . Sold in 350g Kraft Bags, they are the perfect gift to give to your loved ones or to treat yourself. This Bath Potion will relax your body, energise and clear your mind. Add 2 or 3 teaspoons of bath salt to a running bath for an aromatherapy bath experience. If you are looking for a bulk quantity, bath potions are also available in 7kg Hessian Sacks. Order today to offer your customers that magical bath experience.

name: Medium Lilac Bouquet in Wicker Basket
description: These delightful arrangements of soap flowers  can be taken apart and its petals used as scented soap. Petals can be used to decorate a sink as hand soap or sprinkled into a bath. Just add a one or two roses to your warm bath, relax and watch the cute flowers dissolve right before your very eyes. You will surely enjoy the colourful water and the great scent. It will leave your skin soft, silky, and smelling wonderfully fresh.

name: Yellow Clay 80g
description: For centuries, clay has been used for medicinal and cosmetic purposes in many cultures. Nowadays, clay face masks are used as one of the most effective treatments for skin problems. Here we have the most popular AWGifts - Dropshipping Clay Face Mask powders - Yellow Clay 80g. How to make clay mask- Mix a small amount of the clay with water or our Floral Water until it forms into a smooth paste.- Apply the clay mask on the face or body and allow it to stand for about 10 to 15 minutes, or until the paste dries.- Rinse with lukewarm water and pat the face dry with a soft towel.- You can even add essential oils to the clay mask for better results.Please click on each product to see more about our wholesale Clay Face Mask.Let's face it.  you need this increasingly popular product in your E-shop product portfolio.

name: Botanical Facial Steam Blend - Natural 25g
family: Floral Bath Soak & Facial Steam Blend
description: Botanical Facial Steam Blend - Elevate Your Skincare Ritual with Nature's FinestBotanical Facial Steam Blend is an exquisite fusion of nature's most refined elements, designed to enhance your customer's skincare routine. Immerse them in a serene experience that harnesses the potency of lavender flower petals, rose petals, chamomile flower petals, and calendula flower petals.Lavender, renowned for its soothing properties, gently nurtures and relaxes the skin. Teaming up with the graceful elegance of Rose, this botanical duo forms a balanced blend that rejuvenates and harmonizes the complexion.The infusion of Chamomile introduces a touch of tranquility to the steam, reducing redness and inflammation for a refreshed and revitalized skin appearance.Elevating the steamer's effectiveness is Calendula, celebrated for its soothing and healing attributes. These golden petals work harmoniously to nourish and promote skin health, leaving you with a radiant and luminous glow.Our Botanical Facial Steamer delicately opens up the pores, allowing the steam to transport the active compounds of these botanical ingredients deep into the skin. As the steam envelops the face, tension and impurities dissipate, replaced by a renewed sense of calm and clarity.How to use: Just add a handful of the floral blend to a bowl of boiling water, lean over the bowl and put a towel over your head to contain the steam. Wait up to 10 minutes and then use a cotton cloth to wipe the face clean.

name: Bath Bomb Kit - Rose & Bubblegum
description: Bring the fun to bath time with DIY Bath Bomb Kit , made in England, this kit is designed to awaken your customers senses and elevate the bath time experience. With this fun and exciting kit, you can create up to 10 bath bombs and experiment with various aroma combinations provided in the kit.The process is simple and enjoyable. Just mix the included sodium bicarbonate, Himalayan salts and fragrances, then add roses petals and sugar shapes salts into one of the moulds provided to shape your bath bomb. Within an hour, you'll have 10 beautifully scented bath bombs ready to use. Unleash your creativity by mixing colours in different styles and blending various salts and fragrances to curate your ideal sensory journey. Consult the instructions guide for inspiration and create the perfect mood you desire.These unique bath bombs can be cherished for your own relaxation or make wonderful gifts for someone special. Elevate your bath routine with Bath Bomb Kit and indulge in a sensational and rejuvenating bath time experience like never before! DYI Kit Includes: Rose Petals, Sugar Fun Shapes, 500g Himalayan Salt, 200g Citric Acid, 2 Different Bath Bombs Moulds, 2 Amazing Scents, 3 Primary Dyes and Step by Step Instructions. Instructions:Step 1: Empty the Sodium bicarbonate & desired amount of Himalayan salt, petals & sugar shapes into an empty bowl.Step 2: Pour in 10ml of water and mix together until the mixture begins to stick. If it feels dry add a few more drops of water.Step 3: If you wish to create multiple variations of bath bombs, split the mixture equally. Add the colouring and fragrance oil to your mixture(s) mix thoroughly before adding the Citric Acid.Step 4: Scoop the mixture into both sides of the mould and squeeze tightly.Step 5: Squeeze the sides of the mould gently to release the bath bomb and set aside to dry for 60 minutes.Surprise someone special with these wonderful creations. Get your DIY Bath Bomb Kit today!

name: Klay Soap - Lavender & Vanilla
description: This soap is enriched with Bentonite clay, known for its deep cleansing and purifying properties. It helps remove impurities, toxins, and excess oil, leaving your skin feeling clean, refreshed, and renewed. Lavender seeds provide gentle exfoliation, helping to remove dead skin cells and reveal a smoother, more radiant complexion.Calming Lavender & Vanilla FragranceEnjoy the soothing blend of aromatic lavender and sweet vanilla.Lavender: Relaxing floral notes to calm your senses.Vanilla: Adds a warm, subtle sweetness for a comforting touch.Perfect for unwinding after a long day, this soap offers a tranquil and indulgent experience for both your skin and senses.

name: Klay Soap - Honey Oatmeal
description: This soap combines the gentle cleansing power of kaolin clay with the nourishing benefits of real oatmeal. It helps absorb excess oil, leaving your skin soft, smooth, and refreshed. Perfect for controlling shine and reducing oiliness, it pampers your skin while providing a gentle cleanse.Comforting Honey & Oatmeal FragranceEnjoy the warm, soothing blend of sweet honey and toasted oatmeal.Honey: Adds a rich, natural sweetness with a touch of golden warmth.Oatmeal: Brings a cozy, wholesome aroma for a comforting feel.This nurturing scent calms your senses, making every wash a refreshing and indulgent experience.

name: Klay Soap - Orange and Ginger
description: This soap blends the purifying properties of yellow clay with the gentle exfoliation of coffee grounds. Together, they deeply cleanse your skin by removing dead cells, dirt, and excess oil, leaving it smooth and refreshed. The exfoliation process also helps unclog pores, promoting clearer, healthier-looking skin while reducing the chances of breakouts.Energizing Orange & Ginger FragranceBrighten your day with the uplifting scent of orange and ginger.Orange: A burst of fresh, citrusy sweetness for a refreshing lift.Ginger: Warm and spicy, adding a revitalizing kick.This vibrant fragrance awakens your senses, leaving your skin feeling invigorated, refreshed, and energized after every use.

name: Klay Soap - Bergamot & Sandalwood
description: This nourishing soap is crafted with Fuller's earth clay, activated charcoal, shea butter, coconut butter, and exfoliating cranberry seeds for a luxurious cleansing experience. It detoxifies and replenishes the skin’s natural moisture while helping to tighten and tone, reducing the appearance of pores for a smoother, more youthful look.Rich, Earthy FragranceEnjoy the sophisticated blend of bergamot, vetiver, and sandalwood.Bergamot: Bright and citrusy, adding a refreshing top note.Vetiver: Smoky and green, offering depth and complexity.Sandalwood: Smooth and woody, creating a calm, grounding finish.This balanced fragrance refreshes and soothes, leaving your skin subtly scented and feeling rejuvenated after every use.

name: Natural Loofah Scrub on Rope - 5" - 12.7 cm
Agnes + Cat Wellness Gift Set - Lake Breeze
description: Agnes + Cat Wellness Gift Set - Lake Breeze A soothing, coastal-inspired pamper set handmade in the UK. Fresh, gentle and perfect for unwinding, it’s a thoughtful gift for anyone who enjoys slow, restorative self-care. Lake Breeze brings together a Windermere soap bar, a Seasalt & Moss solid shampoo bar, a Salted Caramel lip balm and a Sleep essential oil roll-on made with chamomile, lavender and neroli. Each item is crafted with care and presented in a soft grey, house-shaped gift box decorated with floral cut-out designs.The scent story blends mineral freshness with calming aromatherapy notes, creating an easy, peaceful ritual for morning or evening. The shampoo bar offers a moisturising cleanse, the soap feels clean and comforting, and the roll-on adds a gentle dose of relaxation whenever it’s needed.

name: Agnes + Cat Wellness Gift Set - Bloom & Bliss
description: Agnes + Cat Wellness Gift Set - Bloom & Bliss A soft, floral-themed pamper set designed to bring a little calm into everyday life. Handmade in the UK, it’s a ready-to-gift treat for anyone who loves simple, uplifting self-care. This set brings together four gentle essentials: a Japanese Bloom soap bar, a nourishing solid shampoo bar, a Sparkling Fizz lip balm, and a Happy essential oil roll-on made with spearmint, orange and myrrh. Each piece is crafted with care and presented in a pretty house-shaped gift box decorated with delicate floral details.The scent profile leans light and joyful, with soft blossom notes balanced by the bright, cheerful aroma of the roll-on blend. It’s the kind of set that encourages slow moments: a comforting shower, a touch of balm on the go, or a calming pulse-point roll-on before starting the day.

name: Agnes + Cat Wellness Gift Set - Moroccan Morning
description: Agnes + Cat Wellness Gift Set - Moroccan Morning A bright, energising wellness set handmade in the UK, inspired by warm mornings and sunlit rituals. It’s a thoughtful way to start the day with a little more focus and freshness. Moroccan Morning brings together four handcrafted essentials: a Moroccan Roll soap bar, a strengthening Moroccan Roll solid shampoo bar, an Espresso lip balm and a Focus essential oil roll-on scented with rosemary, cypress and lemon. Each piece sits inside a soft terracotta-toned, house-shaped gift box featuring delicate floral cut-out designs.The scent blend is uplifting without being overpowering—herbal, citrusy and quietly invigorating. The soap and shampoo offer a clean, refreshing start, while the roll-on helps create a moment of clarity whenever you need it. The Espresso lip balm adds a smooth, comforting touch to the routine.

name: Agnes + Cat Fragrance Gift Set - Tea & Roses
description: Agnes + Cat Fragrance Gift Set - Tea & Roses A soft and romantic home-fragrance set handmade in the UK, blending the gentle sweetness of roses with the comforting warmth of tea. A lovely way to make any room feel calm and inviting. This set includes four scented wax melts, a white ceramic oil burner with delicate cut-out florals, and a tea light to get everything started. The fragrance is cosy yet floral—light rose notes softened by a touch of warm tea—creating a comforting atmosphere without overwhelming the space. The melts sit beautifully in the scalloped dish of the burner, slowly releasing scent as they warm.Packaged in a pink, house-shaped gift box with charming floral details, it’s an easy all-in-one gift for anyone who enjoys peaceful evenings, soft fragrance and simple rituals that make home feel more welcoming.

name: Agnes + Cat Fragrance Gift Set - Moroccan
description: Agnes + Cat Fragrance Gift Set - Moroccan A warm, sun-kissed home fragrance set handmade in the UK. Inspired by glowing evenings and soft spices, it adds a cosy, inviting scent to any corner of your home. This set includes four scented wax melts, a white ceramic oil burner with delicate cut-out florals and a tea light to begin your fragrance ritual. The aroma leans comforting and warm, bringing a gentle hint of Moroccan ambience as the melts slowly release their scent in the scalloped dish.Everything is presented in a terracotta-toned, house-shaped gift box decorated with floral details. It’s beautifully giftable and easy to enjoy straight away, whether you’re freshening a living room, softening a bedroom atmosphere or creating a calm moment at the end of the day.

name: Agnes + Cat Fragrance Gift Set - Windemere
description: Agnes + Cat Fragrance Gift Set - Windemere A fresh, clean home-fragrance set inspired by quiet lakeside mornings. name: Ancient Witch Perfume Oil - Cursed
description: Dark, spicy, and quietly seductive, Cursed is a perfume oil that leans into mystery. It opens with a warm hit of black pepper, cinnamon, and clove, setting an intense tone that feels bold without being overpowering. As the scent settles, soft rose and frankincense emerge at the heart, adding depth and a subtle, smoky elegance. The base unfolds slowly into smooth vanilla, amber, and musk, creating a lingering finish that feels intimate, comforting, and slightly addictive.Made in the United Kingdom, this perfume oil is designed to be worn on the skin, offering a long-lasting fragrance experience in a concentrated format. Part of the Ancient Witch Perfume Oil collection, Cursed suits those drawn to rich, atmospheric scents with character, whether worn daily or chosen for moments that call for something a little darker.

name: Ancient Witch Perfume Oil - Hecate
description: Layered, luminous, and quietly powerful, Hecate is a perfume oil that unfolds slowly on the skin. It opens with a bright blend of bergamot, lemon, lime, apple, and cassis, giving the first impression a fresh, almost sparkling lift. At the heart, a rich floral core comes forward. Jasmine, rose, lily, freesia, violet, and gardenia intertwine to create a soft yet expressive centre that feels elegant rather than sweet. The fragrance settles into a deep, grounded base of patchouli, sandalwood, and cedarwood, warmed by amber, vanilla, tonka, and musk for a smooth, lasting finish.Designed to be worn on the skin, this concentrated perfume oil offers depth and longevity without feeling heavy. Part of the Ancient Witch Perfume Oil collection, Hecate suits those drawn to complex, floral-woody fragrances with presence, balance, and a refined sense of mystery.

name: Ancient Witch Perfume Oil - Atheme Noir
description: Clean, fluid, and quietly intense, Athame Noir is a refined perfume oil with a cool, modern edge. It opens with lavandin, neroli, and bergamot, creating a fresh, aromatic start that feels crisp and controlled rather than sharp. The heart introduces orange flower with a subtle watery note, softening the composition and adding a smooth, almost mineral quality. This keeps the fragrance light on the skin while maintaining depth and balance as it develops.As it settles, tonka, orris, and musk form a gentle, powdery base that lingers close, warm and understated. Designed to be worn on the skin, this concentrated perfume oil offers a calm, confident presence. Part of the Ancient Witch Perfume Oil collection, Athame Noir suits those drawn to minimal, elegant scents with a darker, ritual-inspired edge.

name: Ancient Witch Perfume Oil - Eclipse Oud
description: Deep, smoky, and unapologetically bold, Eclipse Oud is a perfume oil built around contrast. It opens with black pepper, saffron, and cardamom, creating an immediate warmth that feels spicy, rich, and commanding. At the heart, oud takes centre stage, layered with rose, patchouli, and leather. The result is dark and textured, balancing softness with intensity as the fragrance develops on the skin. It feels enveloping without becoming overwhelming.The base settles into amber, musk, sandalwood, and vanilla, smoothing the edges and giving the scent a slow, lasting warmth. Designed to be worn on the skin, this concentrated perfume oil offers depth and longevity. Part of the Ancient Witch Perfume Oil collection, Eclipse Oud suits those drawn to powerful, resinous fragrances with a luxurious, atmospheric finish.

name: Ancient Witch Perfume Oil - Lost in Sin
description: Soft, sensual, and quietly intoxicating, Lost in Sin is a perfume oil that draws you in rather than announcing itself. It opens with a gentle citrus lift of bergamot and orange, softened by herbal and armoise notes that give the first impression a smooth, slightly green edge. The heart reveals a delicate floral layer, where lily and iris bring a powdery elegance that feels refined and intimate. Nothing sharp or sweet, just a calm, flowing transition that sits close to the skin.As it settles, sandalwood, amber, tonka, vanilla, and an intense musk create a deep, lingering base. Warm and enveloping, the dry-down feels indulgent without being overpowering. Designed to be worn on the skin, this concentrated perfume oil offers lasting depth and presence. Part of the Ancient Witch Perfume Oil collection, Lost in Sin suits those drawn to softer, musky fragrances with a dark, sensual undertone.
